message:
fix(codegen): Register critical internal modules (_io, _signal, _socket, _thread)

Add missing internal module registrations to fix import errors:
- _io: Core I/O operations
- _signal: Signal handling
- _socket: Low-level socket operations
- _thread: Thread primitives

These are fundamental CPython internal modules that tests depend on.

Test:
- import _io; -> works
- import _signal; import _socket; import _thread; -> all work

Related to issue documented in .claude/CLAUDE.md about missing modules.
